name: Campaign from a brief (server-side)
description: Turn a short campaign brief into an audience segment and a ready-to-review broadcast draft on the target channel in one encapsulated server-side run.

channelId.description: Channel the campaign broadcast is drafted on.

segmentName.description: Name for the audience segment created from the brief.

brief.description: Short description of the target audience and campaign goal, stored as the segment description.

message.description: The campaign broadcast message copy (max 4096 characters).
